62f875f3a7dcfd134ec0b3ad.question: This movement benefitted from the patronage of Carl van Vechten and had its literature anthologized by Alain Locke. A poet from this movement wrote against the “murderous, cowardly pack” in “If We Must Die” and created Bita Plant in Banana Bottom. Claude McKay belonged to this movement, as did the author of God’s Trombones, James Weldon Johnson. Another writer from it claimed his soul had “grown deep” because he had bathed in the Euphrates and built pyramids by the Nile in a poem in which he “speaks of rivers.” For 10 points, name this movement of African-American writers like Langston Hughes.
62f875f3a7dcfd134ec0b3ad.question_sanitized: This movement benefitted from the patronage of Carl van Vechten and had its literature anthologized by Alain Locke. A poet from this movement wrote against the "murderous, cowardly pack" in "If We Must Die" and created Bita Plant in Banana Bottom. Claude McKay belonged to this movement, as did the author of God's Trombones, James Weldon Johnson. Another writer from it claimed his soul had "grown deep" because he had bathed in the Euphrates and built pyramids by the Nile in a poem in which he "speaks of rivers." For 10 points, name this movement of African-American writers like Langston Hughes.

answers: The Great Wave off Kanagawa [or The Great Wave at Kanagawa]

62f875f3a7dcfd134ec0b509.question: One film set in this modern day country tracks the filmmaker Peter Falk, who turns out to be an angel that renounced his immortality to join humanity. 62f875f3a7dcfd134ec0b509.answer: Germany [accept West Germany or East Germany at any time]
